clues: A user's monitor shows 'No Signal' after pressing a button on the monitor bezel.
The computer is powered on and the mouse moves on another connected display.
The monitor's power LED is lit but it cycles through input sources without finding a signal.
The monitor has multiple input ports (HDMI, DisplayPort, VGA) but only one is connected to the computer.
The monitor's OSD menu shows it is set to the VGA input even though the cable is connected to HDMI.
